summary: Corrupted calibration register or nonvolatile memory bit upset affecting the cooling-control target.
The ECU continues with a delayed cooling request even though measured temperatures are correct, because the internal target is shifted.
evidence_label: Cooling request remains delayed despite rising temperature
detail: Coolant reached 95.11 C while pump command was 0.265 and fan command was 0.000.

summary: Thermal and cooling-performance evidence appears later than in direct actuation faults because the error begins inside control computation.
detail: Primary diagnostic evidence first appears as cooling performance low.

summary: Coolant temperature rises higher than nominal and protection eventually escalates, illustrating delayed cross-layer propagation.
detail: Coolant temperature crossed the warning threshold.
